productDisplayName: Puma Men Mid CVS Navy Blue Shoes
description: Absolutely stylish and comfortable to wear, the puma 917 Mid canvas shoe is a great addition to your wardrobe. Names after the Porsche 917 that Steve McQueen drove in the legendry movie "Le Mans", this Basketball shoe combines the designs of Speed cat and Future Cat. Perfect for casual outings and weekend picnics, this high ankle shoe offers all the comfort your feet can ever ask for. Team this with jeans and t-shirts for a cool, casual look. This shoe comes with an additional pair of laces in contrast colour to suit your style Upper Canvas upper for durability and breathable comfort Long tongue for a comfortable, snug Fit High ankle with a V-opening at the back for added protection to the ankle Canvas overlays for midfoot support Velcro strap fastener at ankle for a snug, customised fit Lace-ups for snug fit Rubber toe box for enhanced durability and forefoot protection Midsole Full length EVA midsole for lightweight durability Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs, grooves and suction points for maximum durability and traction on all surfaces
